action.reasoning: Observation: WavLM-large + stats-pool + MLP achieved test EER=0.094 (from 0.118 baseline), with dev EER~0 after 8 epochs and rapid loss drop to ~0.003. Analysis: Severe overfitting to seen attacks (A01-A06) in train/dev; insufficient robustness to OOD test (unseen A07-A19, telephony codecs, disjoint speakers). Current aug absent, regularization moderate (dropout=0.1, wd=1e-4), no scheduler. WavLM cache loads successfully. Decision: Add simple train-time aug (random gain + low noise) for robustness, raise classifier dropout to 0.3, wd=1e-3, add CosineAnnealingLR, set 12 epochs + keep safe bs=8/32. Update model.py (dropout), train.py (aug, AutoFeatureExtractor, scheduler, params), predict.py (AutoFeatureExtractor). Run full training then submit_eval on best.pt for improved OOD EER and time check.
